caption: The video features a man dressed in a formal suit and tie, standing in front of a backdrop that includes the logo and website of the IEA (International Economic Association). He appears to be delivering a speech or presentation, as indicated by his use of hand gestures for emphasis. The setting suggests a professional or academic event, possibly a conference or seminar. The man is speaking into a microphone, and his body language indicates he is engaged and passionate about the topic he is discussing. The background includes a curtain and a partially visible sign with stars, adding to the formal atmosphere of the event.
